name: GDPR Compliance Exam Configuration Setup
description: You are the Data Protection Officer at Nordviken University in Sweden. Following a GDPR Article 25 audit, implement the required remediation actions in the SEB Server (http://localhost:8080, login: super-admin / admin). Your objective is to establish a compliant environment by creating an exam configuration named 'GDPR Compliant Exam Config' (description: 'GDPR Article 25 - data protection by design and by default'), a 'Privacy-First Connection' (password: 'PrivacyFirst2024!', fallback disabled), and a 'GDPR Exam Template' containing a 'Last Ping Time' monitoring indicator named 'Minimal Monitoring' (warning threshold: 5000, danger threshold: 15000). You must also create and activate an Exam Administrator
